profile.biography: Local Utah-based food truck famous for our Japanese Fried Chicken Katsu (2023 Best of State winner).

media.caption_text: Here is our schedule for the week of 12/1!
Our Grilled Chicken Teriyaki is always freshly grilled! Stop by 2435 S State St, SLC anytime Monday-Saturday from 11-9 or find our truck!
Stop by 2435 S State St, SLC today! We are here until 9 pm!

🌟 Lunch Goals: Unlocked! 🍽️

Looking for the best lunch in Salt Lake City? We’ve got you covered at Square Kitchen Eatery!

🔥 Start with a comforting bowl from @comfortbowlutah 
🥟 Grab some fresh-baked empanadas from @argentinasbestempanadas 
🇩🇴 Taste the bold flavors of the Dominican Republic at @hispaniolaslc 
🧋Indulge in killer Boba Tea from @shibaboba_slc 

📍 Find us all at Square Kitchen Eatery and make lunchtime legendary!

#supportlocal #slcfoodie #squarekitcheneatery #empanadas #dominicanfood #bobatea #comfortfood #lunchtime #southsaltlake #squarekitcheneatery

Craving comfort? We’ve got you covered! @comfortbowlutah is packed with tender teriyaki chicken, fluffy rice, and all the cozy vibes you need. Perfectly saucy, perfectly satisfying—just what you need to warm up your day!

✨ Available for lunch and dinner at Square Kitchen Eatery 2435 S State St or their food truck! Because comfort food isn’t just a meal, it’s a feeling.

#comfortbowl #teriyakichicken #squarekitcheneatery #eatgoodfood #saltlakefoodie #smallbizlove #squarekitchen #southsalakefoods #chickenkatsu #sslc #ssl #foodhall #foodentrepreneurs

media.caption_text:
Lunch or dinner? @comfortbowlutah has you covered! 🍛🍤

Dig into their Chicken Teriyaki Bowl—tender, flavorful chicken over a bed of rice, drizzled with their signature teriyaki sauce. Pair it with crispy Tempura Shrimp for the perfect combo!

Stop by our Eatery today, opens at 11 am and treat yourself to a meal that hits the spot!

#chickenteriyakibowl #tempurashrimp #lunchtime #dinnertime #eatgoodfeelgood #comfortbowl #bestkatsu #asianfood #squarekitcheneatery #ssl #southsaltlake #nofiltersneeded

user.full_name: South Salt Lake Chamber of Commerce

media.caption_text: Dinner plans? Sorted! 🔥 Swing by @comfortbowlutah tonight for the best katsu chicken in town—crispy, tender, and packed with flavor. Don’t miss out on this incredible bowl deal! #comfortbowl #katsuchicken #dinnergoals #eatgoodfood #ssl #squarekitchen #slc #utah #utahrestaurants

user.full_name: South Salt Lake Chamber of Commerce

media.caption_text:
🍴Hey Utah! Here in the heart of South Salt Lake right off of I80 on State Street is Square Kitchen Eatery! Inside is three wonderful restaurants!  @argentinasbestempanadas,  @comfortbowlutah, and us, Shiba Boba! While we are sad to see  @drunken_kitch go we are happy that they are all grown up and moving forward with their journey! The new restaurant to join SKE is coming soon and we can’t wait to announce who they are!
🍴

🍴

🍴

🍴Square Kitchen Eatery is located at 2435 S State Street. Open Monday-Saturday 11am-9pm

🍴Hope to see you soon!!

🍴#squarekitchen #squarekitcheneatery #empanadasargentinas #comfortfood #comfortbowl #shibabobautah #boba #empanadas #ricebowls #katsu #tempura #empanadalover #bobalover #utahfoodie #utaheats #katsulover #goodeats

media.caption_text:
📣 Square Kitchen Eatery is the final stop for our incredible who are ready for the next step in the incubation process. Located in South Salt Lake, our talented, up-and-coming chefs bringing unique flavors and innovative cuisine to the city. 
Each chef has poured their heart into creating dishes that reflect their passion and heritage, making Square Kitchen Eatery a must-visit destination for food lovers. This is more than a restaurant—it’s a showcase of culinary creativity and community.

As a spinoff of @squarekitchenslc, we’ve curated an experience that celebrates these rising stars. So, come join us, discover new flavors, and support local talent. Square Kitchen Eatery is calling your name! 🍲🔥

📍2435 S State St, South Salt Lake, UT

#SquareKitchenEatery #SquareKitchenIncubator #SouthSaltLake #FoodLovers #SupportLocalChefs

media.caption_text: Hi everyone! We are having our Grand Opening today (9/12/24) at 2435 S State St, South Salt Lake. We would love to see you!
